category_sources: Official jtroo/kanata README describes it as a software keyboard remapper for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
source_facts.description identifies Kanata as a cross-platform software keyboard remapper.
display_name_sources: Official jtroo/kanata README uses the display name Kanata.
docs_sources: Official README links to the configuration guide and provides install/build usage.
Official repository docs/config.adoc is the configuration guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jtroo/kanata, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists remapping features including layers, tap-hold behavior, macros, and Unicode.
source_facts.description mentions keyboard remapping across Linux, macOS, and Windows.
